LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. ATTY. FRANK S. MOORE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF EARVONTE GRAYS, BY HIS GUARDIAN, LISA COOPER IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PROOF OF SERVICE STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS SERVED BY MAIL ON JANUARY 7, 2014. THE LAST DAY FOR TIMELY SERVICE WAS JANUARY 4, 2014. (SEE CCP SEC. 1005(B), "'IF THE NOTICE IS SERVED BY MAIL, THE REQUIRED 16-DAY PERIOD OF NOTICE BEFORE THE HEARING SHALL BE INCREASED BY FIVE CALENDAR DAYS IF THE PLACE OF MAILING AND THE PLACE OF ADDRESS ARE WITHIN THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA."). JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

Appearances:
Frank S. Moore, Esq. of the Law Office of Frank S. Moore, Tel. 415.292.6091, counsel for plaintiff, and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. FRANK S. MOORE, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF EARVONTE GRAYS, BY HIS GUARDIAN, LISA COOPER is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
ATTY. FRANK S. MOORE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF EARVONTE GRAYS, BY HIS GUARDIAN, LISA COOPER is Off calendar. The proof of service states that the motion was served by mail on January 7, 2014. The last day for timely service was January 4, 2014. (See CCP sec. 1005(b), "'if the notice is served by mail, the required 16-day period of notice before the hearing shall be increased by five calendar days if the place of mailing and the place of address are within the State of California."). Judge: A. James Robertson, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/AR)
